import pytest

def merge_sorted(left: list[int], right: list[int]) -> list[int]:
    """Merges two sorted lists into a single sorted list."""
    result = []
    i = 0
    j = 0
    while i < len(left) and j < len(right):
        if left[i] <= right[j]:
            result.append(left[i])
            i += 1
        else:
            result.append(right[j])
            j += 1
